rows.description: Item de solutis varijs.
rows.notes: Consensus on type and empty amounts. Gemini-flash description is visually more accurate ('varijs').

rows.description: For deficiency of money recd into, and out of ye treasury —

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to cover a deficiency between receipts and payments in the college treasury, amounting to £0 5s 5d.

Gemini-flash incorrectly merged the total with the last pensioner's line, effectively missing it as a distinct row.
